modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request for downloading and installing ArcGIS software.

full_description_text:  
The user was on a call seeking assistance with downloading GIS software. They specifically requested the installation of ArcGIS 10.7 and mentioned needing a licensed version of ArcMap. There were some language barriers during the conversation, which made it slightly challenging to clarify all details.
short_description: Request for downloading and installing ArcGIS software.
description: The user was on a call seeking assistance with downloading GIS software. They specifically requested the installation of ArcGIS 10.7 and mentioned needing a licensed version of ArcMap. There were some language barriers during the conversation, which made it slightly challenging to clarify all details.
